\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5847 introduces Underspecified Equation (Pending Review) as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} q(r) = \frac{r B_{\phi}}{R_0 B_{\theta}} > q_{critical} \approx 2.8 \end{equation}
